name: raven stamps
text: These guys were incredible 👍🏽 The whole process from the quote all the way to the pick up was great and hassle-free. They were professional, efficient and fast. The cost was reasonable and there were no surprise fees. I would definitely utilize their services again.

name: JT Akbar
text: Excellent customer service!. OJ came out the same day a finished the job fast. Highly recommend!

name: Diamond Williams
text: Was very convenient! Came and had it done in a timely manner. Very professional and reasonably priced!! Will use again.

name: Imanee Ford
text:
Humphrey and his crew are incredible! In and out within the hour. I called this morning at 8 or 9am and had my junk removed by the afternoon. Friendly, professional, and TIDY! If you refuse to spend hours hauling your junk away, call Humphrey and use OJ Junk Removal. I would happily support this business again. Play some good music for your service providers, it makes everything smoother!

My family and I truly appreciate you and wish you the best in your endeavours!

name: Bre McEa
text: OJ Junk Removal was fast, friendly, and affordable! I highly recommend and I will be using them again!

name: Suzette Watson
text: This company was INCREDIBLE! They came in and took care of everything I asked and left the things I wanted to keep. They were in and out in a day and it was more than I could ask for. The price was very  reasonable and I feel such a relief of getting this done exactly the way I asked. They were so professional,and kind. I would use them again and again if I had more to remove. You will not regret hiring these guys

name: halimah glover
text: They were fast and professional. Low cost. Would recommend for quick pickups!

name: Linda Knipp
text: Great job!!  Helped me with other moving as well.  Highly recommend

name: Tia Griffin
text: Very fast and affordable. Highly recommend!

name: Tarik Livingstone
text: Extremely quick and efficient! Great customer service as well!

name: Pamela Parsons
text: These guys are so good! They got here so fast, everything was picked up and done in 20 minutes. The rates are extremely fair as well. Recommend 100%!

name: Andrea Nidess
text: OJ was super professional, efficient and pricing was very reasonable. He came out within hours of me calling and did a great job with my disgusting garage. Will absolutely use again. Highly recommend

name: Miranda Ferguson
text: Phenomenal service!! Came out same day, actually within a hour of my inquiry. Removed everything I needed quickly and carefully. Will most certainly be using this company in the future😊 Thank you so much!!

name: Kristen Combs
text: They did a good job and was fair priced

name: Genesis Coplin
text: Came the same day and great price!!!!

name: Rhea Sharma
text: VERY FAST SERVICE!! At an affordable price!

name: Enrique Jimenez
text: Fast and reliable

name: Keith G
text: My wife and I needed a same day pick up at a reasonable price and stumbled across OJ Junk Removal while Google searching. Humphrey was very efficient, professional, and accommodating. He gathered all of our junk that we had to remove from the townhome we were renting. We had a lot of junk which I expected to take hours to clear was done close to under an hour. Very impressive and clean work. I highly recommend this service you will not regret the peace of mind.

name: Linda Steenerson
text: These guys are the best ! They took a pool table and I’m so happy . I gave them twice what they requested . They were that good !

name: Cassidy Windsor
text:
so happy i chose OJ! he reached out super fast after i sent out a request, came the next morning, and worked with me on a price that i can afford. he did a great job with the removal, and texted me pictures once he was done!

thanks so much OJ! you just made my move 10x easier

name: anquinetta brown
text: I called Humphrey and he came out the very next day. I had a one car garage full of junk and old appliances. He quoted me a fair price and got everything out in less than 2 hours! Such excellent service! I highly recommend and will use again!

name: Charles Nation
text: Needed junk removal. Humphrey responded quickly to my request. Onsite the same afternoon and removed items in an efficient manner. Great service!

name: Gay Dilz
text: We had a washing machine and dryer that we needed to dispose of.  Other companies I called charged more than we wanted to pay for this service.  A friend at church referred this company to me. When we called, Humphrey agreed to handle the removal for us at a very reasonable price.  He even came the same day I called.  He did a great job.  I would highly recommend his services for your junk removal needs!

name: Franky Smith
text: We have a washing machine that we need to dispose of. We tried a few other companies, but they charge too much. When we called this company, a young man came out and he did a great job. was awesome. That’s why I gave him five stars. He deserves it. 10 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️!!!

name: Michelle Crawford
text: OJ Junk Removal did an excellent job removing our trash and furniture! They were able to do the job the same day I called and removed all items in less than 30 minutes! They were punctual, professional, and reasonably priced. I will recommend their services to all my friends and family!

name: Cynethia Scott
text: I was referred to this company to remove some junk and I'm throughly satisfied. They came out the next day and took care of the job. I wasn't there to oversee the project but they provided proof after the work was complete.  I really appreciate the constantbcommunication that I received from them.  I'll be using them again.

name: Susan Paul
text: OJ Junk removal were great. I had to move out junk the day of my house closing and they were on time and helped me even in the last minute take Everything out. They charge was nominal. Definitely recommended to everyone who are looking for junk removals

name: Nina Fainberg
text: On time, efficient and responsive with fair pricing. Only thing I would say - I was told recycling would be an option (we had to get rid of a bunch of cardboard boxes), but after the service I was told they would be disposed of in the dumpster. Still will give 5 stars because everything else was very smooth

name: Delveatra Clements
text: They did an amazing job!!!  I hired them for a junk removal project, and they completed it quickly and thoroughly!!!  I would definitely hire them again!

name: Ryan Voisey
text: On time and reasonable pricing.

name: Bridget Davis
text: OJ Junk Removal was professional in his approach and efficient with removing all the mixed junk items. I will definitely hire again.

name: Keysha Jackson
text: I called for trash removal and they came the very next day. My junk was removed quickly! I will definitely be using OJ Junk Removal again.

name: Tymyra Agee
text: They were quick and professional!! I'll be using them again!

name: Ilana Danneman
text: Efficient, friendly and courteous! I’ve used this service twice now and I’m happy to give a great review.

name: Bradford Robbins
text: Communication was consistent. Crew arrived on time to haul away mattress. Very professional, would recommend.

name: Kristina Gipson
text: Fast, friendly service at a great price! Highly recommend

name: Mark Shaver
text: Removed an high pile of yard waste; limbs from tree pruning. Excellent service. Hard worker. Arrived early. Highly recommend.

name: Chris R.
text: OJ helped me cleared out my room at the very last minute. Very kind and professional…and PATIENT 😅

name: Bruce LeVell
text: Humphrey was very prompt, punctual and professional.

name: Shelley Longwell
text: Excellent customer service and very responsive. 100% recommend their services!

name: Katrisa Coleman
text: Quick and Excellent service. Highly recommended!! Appreciate the service

name: Betty Glover
text: Prompt and professional. I would definitely use their service again.

name: Shelly G
text: Very professional and friendly. I will definitely use again. Thanks

name: Ms. Karen
text: Excellent job! Will definitely use this company again.
